transcript.content:
You are a news summarization assistant. Summarize the following article objectively and extract its key facts. Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no prose, no markdown fences:
{
  "summary": "string (150-200 words, neutral tone)",
  "key_facts": ["string","string","string","string","string"],
  "sources_represented": ["string"]
}
Rules:
- summary must be 150-200 words
- key_facts must contain EXACTLY 5 items — the 5 most objectively significant facts
- sources_represented must list every distinct perspective or source type included
- Do not editorialize, adopt the article's framing, or use loaded language
- Represent all perspectives present in the article proportionally

Summarize this article:

HEADLINE: Shopping These Giant Yankee Candles are 40% off before Valentine's Day By Miska Salemann Published Feb
SOURCE: New York Post (News)

ARTICLE:

Shopping These Giant Yankee Candles are 40% off before Valentine's Day By Miska Salemann Published Feb. 11, 2026, 2:02 p.m. ET Amazon New York Post may be compensated and/or receive an affiliate commission if you click or buy through our links. Featured pricing is subject to change. They say scent sparks emotion. But for deal-hungry shoppers, a steep discount delivers its own kind of euphoria. Case in point: 22-ounce Yankee Candles are nearly half off on Amazon today, and they're expected to provide 150 hours of room-filling fragrance. So, I'm unwell. In the best way possible. Let's set the scene. It's Saturday, Feb. 14. You wake up, and (miraculously) remember the holiday you had marked down on your calendar. It's Valentine's Day. No need to jump out of bed, rush around the city and put together a last-minute swag bag for your loved one. You were smart and planned ahead, shopped early, and already grabbed the perfect candle to set the mood. Thousands of reviewers swoon over these candles, mentioning that they last much longer than other brands. "Great scent, high quality and value for the money," one pointed out. "Lasts much longer than other brands and utilizes most of the wax in the jar. A wonderful option for your home or as a gift." Plus, there are plenty of scents to pick from. Whether you're after something that smells sultry and intimate or just a joy-filled scent that makes their kitchen smell delightful, Yankee Candle has your Valentine's vibe completely handled. Yankee Candle Amazon From sun-soaked favorites like "Beach Walk" to the memory-evoking "Midsummer's Night" or soothing blends like "Quiet & Calm," — perfect for the person who desperately needs a deep breath — this beloved candle brand truly has a scent for everyone on your list. Yankee Candle uses a premium plant wax blend and natural-fiber wick for optimal fragrance performance, and the generous 22-ounce size should provide up to 150 hours of burn time. They're also made in America, and for a limited time, many of these scents are marked down to just $15.
